description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a classic, utilitarian design. The headband is covered in brown material, likely leather or faux leather, and features visible stitching along the top. The ear cups are large, circular, and black, with thick padding for comfort and sound isolation. Metal brackets connect the ear cups to the headband, providing structural support and adjustability. A single black audio cable extends from one ear cup, indicating a wired connection. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for extended listening sessions in urban environments.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with a brown padded headband, black cushioned ear cups, and a single wired audio cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing both black ear cups, the brown headband arch, and the audio cable hanging from the left side.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the brown headband's stitching and the cable trailing from the left ear cup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and the headband arch, with the cable visible on the left.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the connection points to the ear cups.
